rulings.Case Title: RIMMA BOROKHOV et al VS. FREEDOM WEST HOMES, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Motion For Summary Adjudication Filed By Freedom West Homes, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 3, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANT FREEDOM WEST HOMES, INC.'s AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). Three issues listed in the Notice of Motion are not the same, let alone repeated verbatim in the Separate Statement, which includes 6 issues. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RIMMA BOROKHOV et al VS. FREEDOM WEST HOMES, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication And Appendix
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 3, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANT ALTON MANAGEMENT CORPORATION, PAULA BUTLER and WILLIAM HUTTON's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Moving party failed to shift burden re: mis-joinder. Moving party failed to shift burden as to the IIED cause of action re: fact #27; or, in the alternative, there is a triable issue of fact (#27) as to the emotional distress suffered by Plaintiffs. Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). Nine issues listed in the Notice of Motion are not the same, let alone repeated verbatim in the Separate Statement, which includes 10 issues. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID KARNER et al VS. ROY SHIMEK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To To Quash Two Deposition Subpoenas For Business Records, And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 3, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANT ROY SHIMEK, PATRICIA SHIMEK, SHIMEK PROPERTIES LLC, CANADIAN-AMERICAN OIL COMPANY'S Motion To Quash Two Deposition Subpoenas For Business Records, And For Monetary Sanctions Moot. Deposition subpoenas withdrawn after filing of this motion. Sanction granted in the amount of $960. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NIKOS GLIMIDAKIS VS. WILLIAM MUNJAR et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 3, 2014, line 3. DEFENDANT WILLIAM MUNJAR's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)
